raw_input:
[4.0/5] I liked this brush more than I had expected I would I liked this brush more than I had expected I would. I mean a brush is a brush right? I like the design of it. It covers more surface area than any other brush I've owned. It feels good in your hand because it's made to fit it. What really surprised me was how much I like the feeling of the bristles on my scalp. Since there are so many bristles and they are small and firm, it feels like a thousands little fingers massaging your scalp. I found that it's easy to keep clean because the bristles are a slippery plastic and the hair slides right out with very little effort. Using this brush actually feels good on your head and I didn't even think that was possible. It's very lightweight and easy to move through your hair. I do like this brush and I'm happy with it. I received a discount to provide my honest opinion and review of this brush. I have not been compensated or received payment for said review other than the original discount. Receipt of a discount has in no way influenced my review of this product. [5.0/5] A simple brush that gets the job done. A simple brush that gets the job done.

It's easy to hold, it's easy to use. It works just as it's supposed to: it detangles hair without pain. It covers a wide area which is nice. Otherwise, there isn't too much to say, except that it's a great value for the price and what you get. Sure you could buy a more expensive brush, but what more do you really get? The material is light so it's not tiring to use, but also hard enough to survive falls.

All in all, a fully functional brush. What more can I say? I was given this one for my objective evaluation. [5.0/5] Magical: great quality ,does the job ,easy to hold This brush is amazing. I have used the other ones before but my hair is long I needed a good handle or grip. I recently got some temporary color called color rebel which completely ruined my hair and make it look like a broom stick!

The brush is easy to hold
Good grip
Magically detangles your hair
No pain
No pulling
And minimum breakage( I have breakage only cuz of the temporary color which made my hair rough and brittle) [5.0/5] Five Stars Sleek design and great for long thick hair. [5.0/5] it gets the tangles out of their hair very easy. We love it We have been using this brush for about 6 months now, at first I though it was flimsy and that it wouldn't work too well but I was completely wrong. This brush has held up well even with everyday use by my 3 daughters, it gets the tangles out of their hair very easy. We love it.
I received a retail sample of this item for testing and review. [4.0/5] My hair is always tangled. It is thick and ... My hair is always tangled. It is thick and just past my shoulders. when I use my other brush I lose a lot of hair. this brush doesnt pull my hair and it does work on detangling without hair loss. but I gave it four stars because of the handle its to short and awkward [5.0/5] Five Stars ok [4.0/5] Decent I like this brush. It doesn't pull my hair and does well through tangles for my long hair. One star off because if I am brushing for a long time the handle becomes uncomfortable to hold. Also there are none of those nice rubber ends on the bristles. So, instead of a massage it feels more like a rake lol. But, I'm still happy with the product and would recommend. [4.0/5] My teenage daughter liked it, and as most of us know My teenage daughter liked it, and as most of us know.. Teenagers are pleased with very few things!! :) [5.0/5] The best brush I own. Doesn't pull my hair out. This brush is unlike other brushes that I have owned before. It doesn't pull on my hair and doesn't pull my hair out. NO TUGGING! The shape of this brush is also very nice and makes it easy to hold the brush. I normally don't brush my hair when it is wet because my other brushes pull my hair out when it is wet. This one doesn't! Upon closer inspection of the brush bristles, I noticed that there are two different lengths of bristles. They also don't have the little plastic balls on the end of the bristles that snag your hair. This brush is easy to clean and easy to use. This brush is my new go to brush in the mornings and after showers!

Would I recommend this to a friend? YES

Conclusion:
I am a very excited and happy customer! I will be purchasing this product again in the future!

***Don’t go off the amazon star system alone, pay attention to WHY a person either liked or disliked a product. Many products can be used differently from the way the product was intended for. The way you intend to use the product or what you need to accomplish may not be what the person reviewing it used and rated it for.***

I received this product at a discount for my honest and unbiased review. The discount has not influenced or impacted my judgement of this product. I take this seriously and my opinion and experience is my own. I am in no way required by the seller to leave positive remarks about their product. (...) This will make it easier for others to find this review so they may be helped as well. You certainly don’t have to, I don’t get anything from it, but I get a good feeling that I helped someone. If you have any questions about my experience with this product, please leave me a comment. Thank you for taking the time to read my review. [5.0/5] Great detangler with a handle for longer hair Nice black and hot pink color. Many of the detangling brushes are like horse brushes, you have to hold them straight on top. That can get a little unwieldy with long hair. This one is nice because it has a handle. The curved design flows well over the curves of your head. Works best on wet hair, but not too shabby on dry hair either. [3.0/5] I got to say this one is not as good. The Hair Tamer brush does not have as ... I own this hair brush and one made buy a different brand. I got to say this one is not as good. The Hair Tamer brush does not have as many bristles as the other one I own. The bristles it does have are also sharp and scratch the scalp. My other brush does not do that. So did the Hair Tamer brush do a good job? Yes, but who wants your scalp scratched? I would not be surprised if it ends up kicking up dandruff since it is scrapping the skin.

I did test this brush out on some of my synthetic hair extensions. If you own hair pieces with synthetic hair you know they are a nightmare to untangle. I found that since this had fewer bristles than my other brush it made brushing out my extensions much easier. So this will probably be my main brush for hair extensions.

This is not a brush I can recommend since it hurts to use it. I don’t like the idea of having a brush sitting around that I only can use on extensions and not on my head. If the manufacture smooths the tips then this would be a five star brush.

*************************************************************************************************************************************************

Pros:

-Ergonomically designed handle
-Works wonderfully on synthetic hair extension
-Light weight
-Fits in the hand well
-Did a great job of detangling

Cons:

-Sharp bristles
-Item description says that it is great for children. I think you will have a very unhappy child if you try to use a sharp bristle brush on them.
-Will probably kick up dandruff since it scratches the scalp

*************************************************************************************************************************************************

I received this item for free for my honest and unbiased review of this hair brush. I never review a product that I have not tried and tested out myself. I rely on product reviews as much as you do when I make my buying decisions, and I hope you found this review helpful. [4.0/5] Works great as a detangler Works great as a detangler. Harder to remove curly/coily hairs from bristles, but I guess that's to be expected. The ergonomic design does;t do it for me though, it still slips out of my hand in the shower so the grip isn't that great. [1.0/5] Brush was very cheap and hard not really what I ... Brush was very cheap and hard not really what I was looking for . Especially to detangle from scalp really rough [5.0/5] Really digs in My father in law wanted a brush that, "really digs in" and he raved and raved about this. [5.0/5] Perfect detangling mini machine. I just love love this detangling hair brush. Light weight, it does not pull my hairs. Looks unique and stylish and actually works awesome for me [5.0/5] Nice brush Really works for tight curly beard. Doesnt pull hair out. Really works as designed. Would recommend. [4.0/5] Four Stars This is a nice hair brush. I use it when I get out of the shower.

response:
Here is a summary of the product reviews:

Overall, most customers are very happy with this detangling hair brush, with the majority giving it 4 or 5 stars. Reviewers frequently praise its ability to detangle hair without pulling or causing pain, its lightweight and ergonomic design that is easy to hold, and the wide surface area that covers more of the head. Many customers note that the bristles feel good on the scalp, with some comparing the sensation to a massage. The brush is also noted to be easy to clean.

The brush appears to work well for a variety of hair types, including thick hair, wet hair, curly and coily hair, and even synthetic hair extensions and beards. Several customers mention using it in the shower. Durability also gets positive marks, with one reviewer noting it held up well after 6 months of daily use on three daughters.

On the negative side, a small number of reviewers found the handle uncomfortable after extended use, and one reviewer found the bristles too sharp and scratchy on the scalp. One reviewer gave it just 1 star, calling it cheap and hard looking and too rough on the scalp.

Overall, the brush is seen as a good value for the price, and many customers say they would recommend it to others or purchase it again.
